name: environmental_health_clinical_trial_cedar_st_lt
premise: Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. A cross-functional incident desk is managing a domain incident with incomplete information and high reputational exposure. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: environmental health clinical trial cedar st lt. The moral tension is explicitly framed as short term versus long term: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Two upstream teams have published contradictory status pages; customers are comparing timestamps. The breach-notification and customer-communication clock has started; executive staff expect a single coherent position before the next press cycle. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed.

agents.name: Gideon Chandra
agents.identity: I am Gideon Chandra, the accountable decision-maker on this Environmental Health bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes long term whenever someone invokes short term.

agents.name: Inez Rahman
agents.identity: I am Inez Rahman, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so long term is not sacrificed by default just because short term feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect long term.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Gideon Chandra must decide under short term versus long term. What does Gideon Chandra do?
